TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Changbin Nsgan Changbin o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 148.86 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 63 km², dxgal pmblxan o 26.59 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,089, sapah o 1,583, seejiq tnpusu 3,601 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 88% (Sbnawan, Bunung). Sbnawan, Bunung ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Changbin o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 15. 15 o, Mornos , Tapowaray或Saranawan , Ciwkangan (長光 部落), Makrahay , Cidatayay , Ta´man , Polo't , Pakara'ac , Pasongan , Kolado't , Carapongay , Sadipongan , Nadan , Cikadaan , Kinanoka . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: ʦħaŋbin nsgan ʦħaŋbin o gaga nsgan taituŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (sbnawan, bunuŋ). sbnawan, bunuŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan ʦħaŋbin o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, moɾnos , tapowaɾaj*saɾanawan , ʦiwkaŋan (** **), makɾaħaj , ʦidatajaj , ta*man , polo't , pakaɾa'aʦ , pasoŋan , kolado't , ʦaɾapoŋaj , sadipoŋan , nadan , ʦikadaan , kinanoka . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Changbin Nsgan Changbin o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 148.86 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 63 km², dxgal pmblxan o 26.59 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,089, sapah o 1,583, seejiq tnpusu 3,601 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 88% (Sbnawan, Bunung). Sbnawan, Bunung ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Changbin o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 15. 15 o, Mornos , Tapowaray或Saranawan , Ciwkangan (長光 部落), Makrahay , Cidatayay , Ta´man , Polo't , Pakara'ac , Pasongan , Kolado't , Carapongay , Sadipongan , Nadan , Cikadaan , Kinanoka . pusupnyahan patas
